violations.text: At the time of inspection, the kitchen hand-washing sink was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

At the time of inspection, several food items were observed held at 44 to 53 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit (see temperatures). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Lobster stored in the unit from previous day observed at 47 degrees Fahrenheit was voluntarily disposed of. Tomato and hamburgers stocked just prior to opening were moved to colder refrigeration. PIC to ensure food items are stored within the cold zone of the prep top unit to help maintain proper temperature control of the food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

At the time of inspection, Reduced Oxygen Packaged Lobster was observed thawing in refrigeration in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Lobster packaging was sliced open at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The knife used for cutting sandwiches was observed stored improperly (in the space between two pieces of equipment) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Knife was moved to the dish area for proper cleaning and sanitizing at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
